title: location sharer
description: A location sharing application that allows users to easily share their current location with friends and family. The app provides a simple interface where users can generate a shareable link to their location, which can be sent via messaging apps or social media. The app also includes features such as real-time location updates, the ability to set a timer for how long the location will be shared, and options for sharing specific locations (e.g., home, work, or a specific address).
tech: Geolocation API (for accessing the user's current location)
URL Shortening API (for generating shareable links)
LocalStorage or Backend Database (for storing user data and shared location links)
